Video.summary: An engagement symbolizes a commitment you make to one special person. But Dr. Phil's guests are accused of the ultimate betrayal: cheating on their spouse-to-be right before walking down the aisle.
Video.title: Cheating Fiancés

Video.summary: Daniel Pelosi was convicted of second-degree murder in the slaying of investment banker and multimillionaire Ted Ammon -- the husband of his lover, Generosa. He is currently serving 25 years to life but now claims he is ready to explain what really happened the night of the murder. Dr. Phil visits Pelosi behind bars.
Video.title: High Society Whodunit

Video.summary: A father is fighting for custody of his 4 children because his ex-wife is allegedly in a cult.
Video.title: Are My Children in a Cult?

Image.alt: Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?
Are My Children in a Cult?

Video.summary: Darcy says that her sister, Jennifer’s, home is in a state of complete chaos. She says Jennifer and her husband, Ralph, have no rules, their kitchen is bare, the electricity is often shut off, and they put their needs ahead of those of their four children -- who are acting out as a result. Darcy says her nephews, 8 and 10, smoke marijuana, play with weapons and recently started a local forest fire -- and that the 10-year-old once wrote a note asking for someone to kill him in his sleep. She says her 12-year-old niece was recently called to truancy court, and her 16-year-old niece is having unprotected sex in the home with her older, live-in boyfriend. Ralph concedes that he’s struggling to provide for his family financially and has made mistakes as a parent, but says Jennifer is to blame, claiming she’s checked out as a mother. Jennifer admits she’s detached from her family, struggles with depression and has trouble maintaining the household. With this family in dire need of a resolution, Dr. Phil stages a no-nonsense intervention. Are Jennifer and Ralph willing to take the necessary steps to save their family?
Video.title: Parenting Disasters

Video.summary: Dr. Phil takes goes inside the unthinkable: making your own child sick to fulfill a disturbing need for attention. The idea might sound unimaginable, but for people with a psychological disorder called Munchausen by Proxy, it's irresistible. Note: Viewer discretion is advised.
Video.title: Munchausen Mom

Video.summary: The family of a 16-year-old self-professed gang member comes together to urge the teen to turn his life around. And, two former gang members have an important message for the teen -- Is he ready to walk away from the gang life for good?
Video.title: Young, Privileged, And In A Gang

Image.alt: Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang
Young, Privileged, And In A Gang

Video.summary: A woman says her ex-husband enables their daughter's addiction.
Video.title: My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child

Image.alt: My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child
My Ex Is Slowly Killing Our Child

Video.summary: A woman believes she's going to be Vladimir Putin's wife.
Video.title: Homeless and “Engaged” to Putin?

Video.summary: Parents: If your teen talks back, acts out or is just plain rude, you better tune in!
Video.title: Rude Teens

Video.summary: In Part 3 of the Man Camp Series, couples fighting to save their marrages deal with family issues, infidelity, and unexpected visitors.
Video.title: Man Camp Part 3

Video.summary: Amanda says her husband of two years, Jeffrey, was recently caught in an online child sex sting and sentenced to five years in prison, yet she’s not sure if she should leave him. Why does she say she blames herself for what happened? And, hear from Amanda’s parents, Juliet and Timothy, who say they just want their daughter to move on. When Dr. Phil gives Amanda a harsh dose of reality, will she see the situation for what it is? Then, 18-year-old Seri says that two years ago, she fell in love with 26-year-old Hector, who convinced her to quit school and become a prostitute — and give him all the profits. Hector was convicted of sexual assault of a child and is now serving up to 30 years in prison. Seri is raising their daughter and has a new boyfriend, Will, but she admits that she would consider taking Hector back, if given the opportunity. Why does Seri say she still has feelings for her abuser?
Video.title: Crazy, Stupid Love

Video.summary: Dr. Phil gives family freeloaders a wake-up call.
Video.title: Get Your Act Together

Video.summary: When you imagine getting an inheritance, will your financial problems be solved or can the money be more trouble than it’s worth?
Video.title: Fighting Over the Will

Video.summary: Dr. Phil continues his conversation with Christina, who emailed him desperate for help for her daughter, Tara, who she says can be an angry monster. Christina left the home when Tara was 13 years old, but now, she says she's worried that her daughter is in a toxic situation with the ex-husband she calls narcissistic and his 22-year-old new wife who is 20 weeks pregnant. Today, meet the new wife and find out if Dr. Phil can help this chaotic triangle.
Video.title: Family Triangle Drama (Part 2)

Video.summary: Amie says she has no idea how to control her 7-year-old son, Jayden, and even began posting videos of his outbursts online seeking help. But Jayden’s father, Chad, says Amie is just out for attention and blames her for their son’s problems. Can these exes learn to co-parent peacefully?
Video.title: His Ex Posts Son’s Tantrums

Video.summary: Jaime says she divorced her allegedly abusive husband, Jay, after two years of marriage but says he refuses to let her go and lures her back with promises to change. Jay says Jaime pushes his buttons until he blows up. Can this couple save their relationship for the sake of their child, or are they better off apart?
Video.title: Should They Redo Their I Dos?

Image.alt: Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?
Should They Redo Their I Dos?

Video.summary: The conversation continues with a self-admitted adult bully.
Video.title: Bullies Beware Part 2

Video.summary: From the outside, Jason and Shani had the perfect marriage " a big, beautiful house on the lake and three adorable boys " but recently Jason was crushed to learn that Shani's been having an affair with a mutual friend. Now, Shani is torn between her husband and her lover. What would you do?
Video.title: Is This Marriage Really Over?

Video.summary: Who will Brad choose: his wife or girlfriend?
Video.title: Torn Between 2 Lovers Part 1

Video.summary: Couples who say their marriage is on the rocks due to debt.
Video.title: Marriage Crisis: Drowning in Debt

Video.summary: Parents say their daughter's home is unsafe for grandson.
Video.title: Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!

Image.alt: Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!
Grandson in a Filthy Death Trap!

Video.summary: Who will Brad choose: his wife or girlfriend?
Video.title: Torn Between 2 Lovers Part 2

Video.summary: Can married people be friends with someone of the opposite sex without sex getting in the way? At what point does a friendly relationship become an affair of the heart or emotional infidelity? Meet Randy, who says his wife, Amanda, has crossed that line.
Video.title: Affairs of the Heart

Video.summary: Are we raising a generation of ungrateful children? Melissa’s sisters say her sons are the most spoiled boys in North America. They get everything they want – all they have to do is whine. Melissa says her kids just like toys, and she thinks her sisters may be jealous of her lifestyle. Next, Dori admits that her 13-year-old son, Parker, is spoiled. Parker says he won't take no for an answer, and even has a strategy for getting everything he wants. Find out what's behind Dori's need to spoil Parker. Then, Joan says her 14-year-old daughter, Jacquie, is a snob, and her need for trendy clothes is turning her into a materialistic monster. Plus, Lauren spends her entire paycheck shopping, but with no money in her checking account, she’s afraid she could be headed for trouble. Her mom, Diane, says she's not worried, it's just Lauren's way of relaxing.
Video.title: Spoiled and Entitled

Video.summary: Lavena says her 17-year-old son, Trevor, has an out-of-control rage problem and fears he could snap and kill her, her husband, her 5-year-old twins -- or become the next school gunman. And, Karen says she’s at her wits’ end with her 15-year-old daughter, Nicole, who she says sneaks out of the house, uses drugs, skips school and recently stole her car. What’s at the root of the teens’ behavior?
Video.title: Tyrannical Teens

Video.summary: In part one, viewers met 21-year-old Bailey who says she has the greatest love story of the century. She says she met Jasmine on social media eight months ago and that it was love at first post. She says they’ve been communicating day and night but have never spoken on the phone and have never met. When Dr. Phil first tried to talk to Bailey, she became insistent that her mother, Ericka, not participate in the show, and Bailey angrily walked off the stage. Bailey decided to come back to tell Dr. Phil she wants to meet Jasmine for the first time because she has something important to tell her. Will Dr. Phil allow Bailey to meet the target of her obsession?
Video.title: "My First Face-To-Face Meeting"

Video.summary: In the summer of 2014, a former middle school English teacher was arrested on suspicion of statutory rape and contributing to the delinquency of a minor after police found her in a motel room with a 15-year-old former student. In a Dr. Phil exclusive, Jennifer Caswell speaks out for the first time. How does she explain her relationship with her former student?
Video.title: Teacher Scandal Confession

Video.summary: Eighteen-year-old Atira is being accused of tearing her family apart. Her mother, Yolanda, sister, Alexa, and brother, Stuart, say the young mom is a "lazy slob," who yells, shoves and cusses, and they’re tired of the chaos she creates. Atira admits she’s full of anger but says her family makes no effort to understand her. Is Atira just an out-of-control, bratty teen, or is a dark secret from her past causing her to lash out? When Dr. Phil digs into this family’s history, will Yolanda, Alexa and Stuart begin to better understand Atira? Then, Atira confronts Yolanda for ignoring her cries for help as a child. Where was her mom when she says she needed her most? Will mother and daughter find a common ground on which to rebuild their relationship? Then, former prosecutor Loni Coombs, author of the new book, “You’re Perfect” ... and Other Lies Parents Tell, joins Dr. Phil. Learn about her six parenting tips for effective listening. Plus, find out how a marshmallow can help you learn critical information about your child’s future, and the most important thing Dr. Phil says you must do with your child every day.
Video.title: A Family Secret & Struggle

Video.summary: You hear about scams all the time - e-mails and voicemails claiming you have won valuable prizes. Dr. Phil is outraged by what some scammers are doing to him, his family and his viewers. One website offers a Dr. Phil quiz to win $5,000 every hour, another says it has the official Dr. Phil personality test, but even more shocking are 800 numbers that take callers' money for the promise of over the phone therapy with Dr. Phil and Robin. But these 800 numbers connect innocent victims with con artists posing as Dr. Phil staff members. The fake staffers ask anywhere from $375 to $1,000 for consultation time that obviously never takes place.
Video.title: DP Scam - Part One

Video.summary: From marital spats to parenting disagreements, learn the biggest mistakes you're making.
Video.title: Top 5 Mistakes You’re Making

Video.summary: In part two, will accused liar Sarah, who fibbed about having cancer, miscarriage and muscular dystrophy, change her ways?
Video.title: Liar,Liar: Sarah Faces Her Accusers

Video.summary: Is there something you’ve been hanging on to for just a little too long? Clothes you haven’t fit into since high school? Boxes of stuff you haven’t looked at in years? Dr. Phil’s guests say their loved ones need to call the junk yard and “Get rid of it!” Kim says her husband, Paul’s, Star Warshobby has to go. With over 6,000 pieces in his collection, Paul spends 30 hours a week playing with his action figures, building models and talking to friends about Star Wars. He even had a light saber sword fight at their wedding, so shouldn’t Kim have known what she was getting into? Next, Larry and Sheila married four months ago, but Sheila says she had no idea she was getting hitched to a hoarder. Larry says she’s got it all wrong -– she’s the pack rat! With some of their favorite collections rolled out on stage, can Dr. Phil help them negotiate what goes and what stays? Plus, meet Terri, who has four storage units and two garages full of sentimental memories -– like a rubber chicken and her father’s spine X-rays! She spends so much money storing her stuff, that she can’t even afford health insurance. What’s at the heart of her hoarding? Don’t miss this hilarious look at how collections can get out of control!
Video.title: Get Rid Of It!

Video.summary: If you think pretty people are immune to heartache, think again. The headlines are filled with stories of striking women who were devastated by infidelity, despite their outward beauty. Dr. Phil sits down with Joey, a husband and father, who says he can’t pass up a pretty face. His wife, Shannon, says he’s slept with close to 100 women since their wedding day. The personal trainer justifies his actions by saying Shannon is overweight and not hot enough for him. Will he get a wake-up call about his cheating ways? Or will his wife take him back yet again? See the shocking text messages to Joey’s mistress, and hear Dr. Phil’s strong message for the hapless husband when a disturbing secret is revealed. Can Dr. Phil encourage Joey to choose another path and look beyond the physical?
Video.title: Beauty Isn’t Enough
